fires.name: Biobío–Ñuble Fires
fires.summary: Swept through south-central Chile in January 2026, killing 21 people and forcing 50,000 to evacuate. 325 homes destroyed.

fires.name: January 2026 Victorian Bushfires
fires.summary: One of Australia's worst fire seasons since Black Summer. Victoria declared a state of disaster across multiple regions.

fires.name: Chubut–Los Alcerces Fires
fires.summary: Fires threatened Los Alcerces National Park in Chubut province in Jan/Feb 2026.

fires.name: Nebraska Panhandle Fires
fires.summary: Largest wildfire in Nebraska history, scorching 640,000+ acres in the panhandle, killing 1 person. Conditions beginning to ease as of March 2026.

last_report.note: Historical fires restored; Nebraska added from Google News Mar 19
